summary: Account Ledger Feature Testing - 100% PASS. All 10 backend tests passed. All 8 frontend UI tests passed. The Tally-style Account Ledger feature is fully functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Indian FY date range logic correctly defaults to Apr 1 of current FY when in March 2026
Good: Account Ledger tab dynamically shows account name when opened (LEDGER: TEST CREDIT CUSTOMER)
Good: Running balance is correctly computed in backend (debit-credit accumulation)
Good: All 7 columns present: Date, Voucher No., Type, Particulars, Debit (Dr), Credit (Cr), Running Balance
Good: Closing balance row shows correct ₹2,000.00 Dr for Test Credit Customer
Good: Back to Chart of Accounts button navigates correctly
Good: Refresh button works on Account Ledger tab
Good: Chart of Accounts rows are clickable and open Account Ledger for that account
seed_data_creation: Test Credit Customer (code 1300-001) with 2 ledger entries: INVOICE ₹5,000 Dr and PAYMENT ₹3,000 Cr, closing balance ₹2,000 Dr - all already created by previous testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Account Ledger feature is fully working. Key verifications: 1) Ledger Module has 9 tabs including Account Ledger tab, 2) Chart of Accounts rows are clickable and open Account Ledger, 3) Account Ledger shows header with account name, code, type chips, 4) Account Ledger shows transaction count and closing balance cards, 5) Account Ledger table has 7 columns: Date, Voucher No, Type, Particulars, Debit, Credit, Running Balance, 6) Test Credit Customer shows 2 entries with correct running balance progression (₹5000 Dr after invoice, ₹2000 Dr after payment), 7) Indian FY date range defaults correctly to Apr 1, 2025 for March 2026, 8) Refresh and Back buttons work correctly.

PASSED: Ledger Module has 9 tabs including Account Ledger tab
Chart of Accounts rows are clickable - clicking opens Account Ledger for that account
Account Ledger shows header with account name, code, type chips
Account Ledger shows transaction count and closing balance cards
Account Ledger table has 7 columns: Date, Voucher No, Type, Particulars, Debit, Credit, Running Balance
Account Ledger for Test Credit Customer shows 2 entries: INVOICE debit ₹5000 and PAYMENT credit ₹3000
Account Ledger closing balance row shows ₹2000 Dr
Running balance is correctly computed (5000 Dr after invoice, 2000 Dr after payment)
Date range defaults to current Indian FY (Apr 1 2025 to today for Mar 2026)
Refresh button works on Account Ledger tab
Back to Chart of Accounts button navigates correctly
GET /api/ledger/accounts/:id/ledger returns entries with running balance

test_categories: TestAccountLedger: Ledger endpoint, columns, running balance (3 tests)
TestTestCreditCustomer: Find account, verify entries, running balance sequence (3 tests)
